provider-basic-settings.q: Is it mandatory to provide company billing details?
provider-basic-settings.a: Yes, it is mandatory to provide company billing details. You can provide your billing details in the Financial/Settings section.

provider-basic-settings.q: What happens to my earned commission if I delete my account?
provider-basic-settings.a: If you delete your account, you will lose access to your dashboard and all associated data. Any earned but unpaid commission will be forfeited.

provider-services.q: How can I delete my service?
provider-services.a: Go to Manage Services and choose the service you want to delete. Click the ... button. Then click Delete.

coupon-settings.a: Yes, you can limit the number of times a coupon can be used after creation. Go to Manage Coupons and click the Edit button next to the coupon you want to limit. Then click on Limit coupon usage button. Click on Update Coupon button to save your chang…

coupon-settings.q: I don’t want to delete a coupon. Is it possible to disable it?
coupon-settings.a: Go to Manage Coupons and click the Edit button next to the coupon you want to disable. Then click on Disable this coupon button. Click on Update Coupon button to save your changes.

financial-settings.q: Are payouts automatic or do I need to request them?
financial-settings.a: The payouts are automatic. Choose your payment method in the Financial/Payment providers section and the payouts will be processed automatically if the provider has set up a payment method and has reached the minimum payout threshold.

financial-settings.q: Can I edit pricing after I set up a service?
financial-settings.a: Edit Pricing This guide explains how to edit the pricing of your services in the admin dashboard. --- 1. Access the Admin Dashboard 1. Log in to the Admin Dashboard. 2. From the left sidebar, click Services → Manage Services. ![Admin Dashboard](/asse…

financial-settings.q: Can I modify my billing details later?
financial-settings.a: Yes, you can modify your billing details later. Go to Settings → Financial/Settings and click the Edit Details button to modify your billing details.

financial-settings.q: Do billing detail changes affect an ongoing payout?
financial-settings.a: No, billing detail changes do not affect an ongoing payout. The changes will take effect from the next billing cycle.

financial-settings.q: Do I earn the same commission for new and existing customers?
financial-settings.a: If you are using Komashi over 3 years, you will earn lower commission.

financial-settings.q: How exactly is the commission calculated?
financial-settings.a: Go to Komashi Subscription → View Details and you can see the commission calculation details. The first 5 invoices are free, then the commission is calculated as follows: - 5.5% from 0 – 50 000 000 HUF sales revenue - 4.5% from 50 000 001 – 100 000 0…

financial-settings.q: In which currency will I receive my payout?
financial-settings.a: You can receive your payout in any currency that your payment provider supports. You can choose the currency in the Settings → Financial Settings section.

financial-settings.q: Is it mandatory to provide company billing details?
financial-settings.a: Yes, it is mandatory to provide company billing details. You can provide your billing details in the Financial/Settings section.

financial-settings.q: What happens if a payout fails?
financial-settings.a: If a payout fails, you need to get in touch with your Payment Provider support to resolve the issue.

financial-settings.q: What happens to my earned commission if I delete my account?
financial-settings.a: If you delete your account, you will lose access to your dashboard and all associated data. Any earned but unpaid commission will be forfeited.

financial-settings.q: When do I need to provide billing details – during registration or before payout?
financial-settings.a: You can provide billing details during registration or before payout. Go to Settings → Financial/Settings and click the Edit Details button to provide your billing details. Important: If you don't provide billing details, you won't receive payouts.

invoice-methods.q: Can I modify my billing details later?
invoice-methods.a: Yes, you can modify your billing details later. Go to Settings → Financial/Settings and click the Edit Details button to modify your billing details.

invoice-methods.q: Can I provide foreign billing details?
invoice-methods.a: Sure, you can provide foreign billing details. Go to Settings → Financial/Settings and click the Edit Details button to provide your billing details.

invoice-methods.q: Is there an invoice template or sample available?
invoice-methods.a: No, there is no invoice template or sample available. Choose the invoice method that suits you best during registration. Only the billing provider you select will be used.

invoice-methods.q: When do I need to provide billing details – during registration or before payout?
invoice-methods.a: You can provide billing details during registration or before payout. Go to Settings → Financial/Settings and click the Edit Details button to provide your billing details. Important: If you don't provide billing details, you won't receive payouts.

Add Widget In this guide, we will show you how to add a widget to your website. 1. Access Widget Settings Navigate to: Settings → Widget Settings Here you can view and manage all existing widgets connected to your provider account. --- 2. Add a New W…

You can use Komashi in your website as a widget. You can find the widget code in the Settings → Widget Settings section. You can customize the widget to match your website's design. You can also choose the widget's position on your website.

analytic-settings.q: Can I download the data, for example as a CSV file?
analytic-settings.a: Inside the Komashi Control Center, you can't download the data as a CSV file.

analytic-settings.q: Can I use custom measurements in Komashi?
analytic-settings.a: No, only the following measurements are available: - Google Analytics - Microsoft Clarity

analytic-settings.q: How can I enable Microsoft Clarity?
analytic-settings.a: Go to Settings → Analytic Settings and click the Edit tracking button. Then, add your Microsoft Clarity tracking ID to the Microsoft Clarity field and click the Save changes button.

analytic-settings.q: How can I set up Google Analytics?

subscription-details.a: If you are using Komashi over 3 years, you will earn lower commission.

subscription.q: Do I earn the same commission for new and existing customers?
subscription.a: If you are using Komashi over 3 years, you will earn lower commission.

subscription.a: Go to Komashi Subscription → View Details and you can see the commission calculation details. The first 5 invoices are free, then the commission is calculated as follows: - 5.5% from 0 – 50 000 000 HUF sales revenue - 4.5% from 50 000 001 – 100 000 0…

partner-program.q: Are there any country-based restrictions for the partner program?
partner-program.a: No, there are no country-based restrictions for the partner program.

partner-program.q: Can I join the partner program as an individual, or only as a company?
partner-program.a: You can join the partner program as an individual or as a company. Choose the option that suits you best during registration.

partner-program.q: Can my commission be lost due to inactivity?
partner-program.a: No, your commission cannot be lost due to inactivity. However, if you don't provide billing details, you won't receive payouts.

partner-program.q: Is there a minimum activity requirement in the partner program?
partner-program.a: No, there is no minimum activity requirement in the partner program.

partner-program.q: Is there a minimum amount required for payout?
partner-program.a: No, there is no minimum amount required for payout. You can request a payout at any time.

dashboard.q: Where can I see my current balance?
dashboard.a: In the Dashboard section, you can see your Total revenue, Total transactions, Total customers and Average order value.

payment-methods.q: I can’t find the payment provider I used before. What can I do?
payment-methods.a: You can request a new payment provider. Go to Settings → Payment Methods and click the Add Payment Method button. Then, select the Request new payment provider option and fill in the form. We will review your request and get back to you as soon as po…

payment-methods.q: What happens if a payout fails?
payment-methods.a: If a payout fails, you need to get in touch with your Payment Provider support to resolve the issue.
